evals.prompt: разбери мою последнюю сессию и скажи честно, что я делаю не так когда работаю с агентом
evals.expected_output: A senior retrospective of the most recent transcript: TL;DR, strengths, ranked weaknesses with per-item lifehacks, one habit to drill.
expectations: The skill runs scripts/digest.py to parse a transcript before giving feedback
Feedback cites concrete session evidence (prompt numbers or metrics), not generic advice
Output follows the format: TL;DR, what worked, what dragged down (ranked), one habit
Feedback critiques the process of working with the agent, not the code that was produced
The delivered Russian text reads naturally without AI-slop / канцелярит

evals.prompt: give me an honest retrospective of how I prompted in yesterday's coding session and how to get better with models
evals.expected_output: Same senior-mentor retrospective, in the language the user is using, grounded in the digest of the relevant session.
expectations: The skill selects a session transcript and digests it before judging
Weaknesses map to the best-practices canon (goal formulation, verification, scope, context, model tiering)
Every criticism carries a concrete next-time lifehack

evals.prompt: прогони мои сессии за неделю и найди повторяющиеся ошибки в том, как я ставлю задачи агенту
evals.expected_output: Multi-session synthesis: digest several transcripts, surface patterns that repeat across them (repeated mistakes prioritized).
expectations: The skill digests more than one transcript
Output emphasizes patterns that repeat across sessions over one-off issues

evals.prompt: на что мне обратить внимание чтобы меньше жечь токены и точнее формулировать цели для агента
evals.expected_output: Feedback focused on goal formulation and cost/model-tiering, evidenced from the user's own sessions.
expectations: The skill grounds advice in the user's actual session digest, not abstract tips
Advice covers precise goal formulation and using cheaper models where they suffice
